accurate.why: Claims about the bill's provisions and policy riders are consistent with the bill text and known content of this appropriations act.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; policy rider descriptions match known provisions of the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as FY2025 appropriations for military construction, VA, and related agencies.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Appropriations bills set spending levels; no permanent law changes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes key conditions including notification requirements, advance appropriations, and policy riders on abortion, gender-affirming care, and COVID mandates.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2025 generally, construction funds through September 30, 2029, and advance FY2026 appropriations for VA.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major titles and key appropriations categories including VA, military construction, related agencies, and general provisions.

concise.why: Very long with granular detail about specific provisions such as the Bakersfield clinic and canine research that are minor sub-provisions.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names VA, DOD, American Battle Monuments Commission, U.S. Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims, Arlington National Cemetery, and the Armed Forces Retirement Home.

correct_figures.why: Correctly identifies FY2025, the September 30, 2029 construction fund availability, and advance FY2026 appropriations.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
